heading.title: Select Your Nationality (Egyptian / International)
heading.subtitle:
Before filling in your information, please select your nationality as a student to guide you to the appropriate form for your data.
This helps ensure the accuracy of information and the proper procedures for each student category.

egyptian.title: Egyptian
egyptian.description: Follows the general requirements for students within the Arab Republic of Egypt.

expatriate.title: International
expatriate.description: Subject to procedures specific to non-Egyptian students.

notes.title: Important Notice Regarding Data Selection:
notes.description: Please ensure that all information is entered accurately, as each student category has a different application form with specific requirements. Inaccurate information may cause delays or rejection of the application. It is advised to review all information carefully before proceeding.

choose_nationality.warning: You must first select your nationality before you can continue filling in your information.

warning_note.title: Important Notice Regarding Data Accuracy:
warning_note.description:
Please ensure that all information entered in this form exactly matches your official documents.

This data is a crucial part of the application review and acceptance process, and any discrepancies or errors may result in rejection or delay.

Please carefully verify all fields before clicking "Click Here to Save Changes".

residence_type_heading.title: Place of Residence:
residence_type_heading.subtitle: Please indicate whether your residence is inside or outside the Arab Republic of Egypt

warning_note.title: Important Notice Regarding Residence Data:
warning_note.description:
Please enter your residence information exactly as it appears in your official documents, without any changes.

This data is used to review and verify the application, and any inconsistencies may lead to delays or rejection.

Please ensure all fields are accurate and match your official documents before proceeding.

heading.title: Student Type:
heading.subtitle: Please indicate whether you are a new student joining the university for the first time, or a continuing student previously enrolled.

info_note.title: Important Notice Regarding Student Type:
info_note.description:
Please ensure the student type is selected accurately before proceeding.

New Student:
A student joining the university for the first time who has not previously registered in any faculty or academic program.

Continuing Student:
A student who has been registered at the university for more than one academic year, either in a higher year or preparatory stage.

This selection determines admission procedures and academic requirements. Providing incorrect information may affect the application outcome.

warning_note.title: Important Notice Regarding Pre-University Education Data:
warning_note.description:
Please enter pre-university education data accurately and clearly, including certificate type, total score, and study system.

This information is used for administrative purposes only and does not affect admission criteria or student ranking.

Any inaccurate information may cause difficulties in processing data correctly. Ensure all answers are correct.

info_note.title: Important Notice Regarding Academic Data:
info_note.description:
Please enter all academic information accurately and clearly, including study level, major, and study system.

This data is for administrative purposes only and does not affect admission decisions or student ranking.

Inaccurate or omitted information may hinder proper processing of your academic data. Verify all details before submission.

relative_heading.title: Guardian Information:
relative_heading.subtitle: Please enter the legal guardian’s or responsible person’s information, if available, for administrative purposes.

parents_status_heading.title: Parents’ Status:
parents_status_heading.subtitle: Please indicate the current status of your parents for administrative and organizational purposes.

warning_note.title: Important Notice Regarding Guardian and Parents’ Data:
warning_note.description:
Please enter guardian and parents’ status information accurately and clearly, as this is used for administrative and organizational purposes during the study period.

This information is necessary for official communication and to ensure proper processing of student-related procedures.

Inaccuracies or missing information may lead to delays or communication issues. Verify all data matches official documents.

error_note.title: Important Notice Regarding Health Disclosure:
error_note.description:
Please provide accurate and clear medical information, as this data is used to assess your health and provide appropriate medical care and support during your stay or study.

This data is required for health and administrative purposes only and is not used for admission decisions or ranking.

Inaccuracies or withheld information may prevent proper care or handling of emergencies. Ensure all responses reflect your actual health status.

info_note.title: Important Notice Regarding Housing Selection:
info_note.description:
Your selection of “Housing Type” helps the administration determine the most suitable accommodation.
If you do not require meals from the dormitory, you can choose “Housing without Meals” to reduce costs.
Please ensure your selection reflects your actual needs before completing the application.

heading.title: Required Documents:
heading.subtitle: Click the 'View Documents' button to see previously uploaded documents. If no documents have been uploaded yet, nothing will appear. Use the fields below to add new documents or update existing ones.

view_documents_heading.title: View Uploaded Documents
view_documents_heading.subtitle: To open a document, click its name. If no documents have been uploaded, nothing will be displayed.

info_note.title: Important Notice Regarding Document Uploads
info_note.description:
When uploading documents for the first time, please click 'View Documents' to ensure the files appear correctly.

If you wish to modify any document, you must re-upload it; previous files will be deleted and replaced with the new ones.

After uploading, verify that the new documents are visible via the 'View Documents' button.

buttons.track_application: Click here to check your application status and progress for each stage.
buttons.period_closed: Cannot edit or complete registration. The registration period is currently closed.

messages.application_number: Student number is (please save it, it may be requested later)
messages.student_not_fount: The student’s application was not found
messages.application_status_change_note: To change a specific status in your application, you must delete the current application and refill the data from the beginning. Please enter data carefully next time.
messages.upload_required_files_note: Please ensure all required files are uploaded to complete your application. Applications will not be considered until all files are submitted.
messages.user_already_exists_note: Another user already exists with these details. Please verify the entered information.
messages.retrieved_successfully: Your saved data has been successfully retrieved
messages.no_documents_uploaded: No documents have been uploaded yet.
messages.update_data_not_available:
The registration period available for you to add or update your data has ended.
No changes can be made at this time.
messages.wait_for_applications_period_start:
The application period has not started yet.
Please wait until registration opens.

documents.nomination_card_image: Nomination Card Photo from Coordination Office
